TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Joe_Alexander, title = Joe_Alexander, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Alexander} }

S.FORM: Joe Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Joe Alexander, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Joe Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 12, Joe Alexander, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oe alexan*er ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *oe alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
